children.heading: Rules and regulations
children.label: a Rules and regulations
children.text: The Administrator shall promulgate regulations requiring each licensee to pursue diligently the construction and operation of the ocean thermal energy conversion facility or plantship to which the license applies.

children.heading: Termination of license
children.label: b Termination of license
children.text: If the Administrator determines that a licensee is not pursuing diligently the construction and operation of the ocean thermal energy conversion facility or plantship to which the license applies, or that the project has apparently been abandoned, the Administrator shall cause proceedings to be instituted under to terminate the license.section 9121 of this title
